name: ExtensionMedicationRequest_DispenseRequest_DispenserInstruction
title: R5: Additional information for the dispenser (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` 0..* `Annotation`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` 0..* `Annotation`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` has a context of MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional information for the dispenser (new)

Element `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` has a context of MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.dispenseRequest.dispenserInstruction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Provides additional information to the dispenser, for example, counselling to be provided to the patient.
